Text: Hahahaha!!!! To accept this message!! Grandma must be crying in heaven!

Name: Noah
Text: What the… is this…?
Hahaha!!! Ah~ this is too funny~!
Hello, ‘Noah’?
We’re meeting for the first time, right?
I think you’ve already met my friend ‘Adam’.
Did you two have a good chat?

Name: Noah
Text: Friend...? Who are you?
Oh dear, even ‘Noah’s Ark’ has seen better days~
You really don’t know anything about personal information leaks, do you?
Didn’t Grandma tell you to ignore messages that aren’t accurate?
Toast1: “Smishing and phishing crimes: Clicking on links from texts or emails can lead to personal information or money being stolen.”
Toast2: “Ignore unverified texts and emails and use your phone's built-in security features to prevent these issues.”

Name: Noah
Text: What is going on right now?

Name: Noah
Text: Who are you? Reveal your identity.

Name: Noah
Text: What have you done to my computer?
Ah~ this is boring.
If I tell you everything, it won’t be fun~
You, as a detective, should figure it out.
If you don’t want to do that, just live quietly helping people.
Don’t disturb me.

Name: Noah
Text: What do you mean…? Disturb?
You’ve ruined everything!!!
You and that hypocritical kid have messed up all my plans!!

Name: Noah
Text: I don’t even know who you are.

Name: Noah
Text: How could I have ruined your plans?
Aren’t you a detective?
Hurry up and figure it out.
But what a pity! It’s already too late!
The friend who was helping you, I just killed him!

Name: Noah
Text: What? You killed my friend?

Name: Noah
Text: Are you serious?
Well... to be precise, I didn’t kill him myself.
When I accomplish my great task, then I’ll bring him back to life.
Until then, he can’t be saved.

Name: Noah
Text: Your great task?

Name: Noah
Text: Was impersonating Grandma and infecting my computer with a virus part of that task?
Exactly! It turned out to be too~ silly, though.

Name: Noah
Text: What exactly is your goal?
Alright, let me give you one hint.
I’m going to become a god in this world.

Name: Noah
Text: What? How can a person become a god?
You’ll find out in due time.
Just sit back and watch helplessly as you suck your fingers at home.

Name: Noah
Text: If you harm others, I won’t just stand by and watch.
What can the forgotten ‘Noah’s Ark’ do?

Name: Noah
Text: Whatever your task is, if it harms this town, I’ll do whatever it takes to stop you.
Do you really think so?
But what a pity, I can control you too.
You were already fooled just by me pretending to be Grandma, right?
I’m really curious how long you can hold out.
Can you hold on for a long time for my amusement?
